faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Cedarhurst home?
faqs.answer: Signs include small holes in wool, cashmere, or silk garments, silky tubes or cases in closets, adult moths flying near wardrobes, and larvae or cocoons in fabric folds. You may also notice damage to upholstered furniture, carpets, or stored blankets. Our technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm infestations.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Cedarhurst?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in Cedarhurst typically range from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of infestation, size of the affected area, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does clothes moth treatment take?
faqs.answer: Initial treatment typically takes 1-3 hours depending on your home's size and infestation severity. Most infestations require follow-up visits spaced 2-3 weeks apart to target newly hatched larvae. Complete elimination usually takes 4-8 weeks with our comprehensive treatment program.

faqs.question: Are your clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are safe when applied by our certified professionals. We can also offer low-toxicity and natural treatment options for sensitive households. All treatments are designed to target moths while minimizing exposure to people and pets.
